'''鈭歾h-w-zh''' ('''zhawazha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:forcurse|forcurse]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-w-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:forcurse|forcurse]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾h-w-zh
|-
! Lemma
| zhawazha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhawazhithi|zhawazhithi]] || [[word:zhawazhiji|zhawazhiji]] || [[word:zhawazhishi|zhawazhishi]] || [[word:zhawazhi|zhawazhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhawazhuthuth|zhawazhuthuth]] || [[word:zhawazhujuj|zhawazhujuj]] || [[word:zhawazhushush|zhawazhushush]] || [[word:zhawazh|zhawazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhawazhuthu|zhawazhuthu]] || [[word:zhawazhuju|zhawazhuju]] || [[word:zhawazhushu|zhawazhushu]] || [[word:zhawazhu|zhawazhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhawazhufuth|zhawazhufuth]] || [[word:zhawazhufuj|zhawazhufuj]] || [[word:zhawazhufush|zhawazhufush]] || [[word:zhawazhuf|zhawazhuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhawazhethe|zhawazhethe]] || [[word:zhawazheje|zhawazheje]] || [[word:zhawazheshe|zhawazheshe]] || [[word:zhawazhe|zhawazhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhawazhothoth|zhawazhothoth]] || [[word:zhawazhojoj|zhawazhojoj]] || [[word:zhawazhoshosh|zhawazhoshosh]] || [[word:zhawazh|zhawazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhawazhotho|zhawazhotho]] || [[word:zhawazhojo|zhawazhojo]] || [[word:zhawazhosho|zhawazhosho]] || [[word:zhawazho|zhawazho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhawazhofoth|zhawazhofoth]] || [[word:zhawazhofoj|zhawazhofoj]] || [[word:zhawazhofosh|zhawazhofosh]] || [[word:zhawazhof|zhawazhof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhawazh忙th忙|zhawazh忙th忙]] || [[word:zhawazh忙j忙|zhawazh忙j忙]] || [[word:zhawazh忙sh忙|zhawazh忙sh忙]] || [[word:zhawazh忙|zhawazh忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhawazhathath|zhawazhathath]] || [[word:zhawazhajaj|zhawazhajaj]] || [[word:zhawazhashash|zhawazhashash]] || [[word:zhawazh|zhawazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhawazhatha|zhawazhatha]] || [[word:zhawazhaja|zhawazhaja]] || [[word:zhawazhasha|zhawazhasha]] || [[word:zhawazha|zhawazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhawazhafath|zhawazhafath]] || [[word:zhawazhafaj|zhawazhafaj]] || [[word:zhawazhafash|zhawazhafash]] || [[word:zhawazhaf|zhawazhaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:zhawazhasha|zhawazhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gozhawazhasha|gozhawazhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokizhawazhasha|gokizhawazhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:zhawazhn眉sha|zhawazhn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gozhawazhnkn眉sha|gozhawazhnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokizhawazhn眉sha|gokizhawazhn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhawazhsh毛sha|zhawazhsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhawazhnksh毛sha|gozhawazhnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhawazhsh毛sha|gokizhawazhsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhawazhrosha|zhawazhrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhawazhnkrosha|gozhawazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizhawazhrosha|gokizhawazhrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhawazhmusha|zhawazhmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhawazhnkmusha|gozhawazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhawazhmusha|gokizhawazhmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:zhawazhsherasha|zhawazhsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gozhawazhnksherasha|gozhawazhnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokizhawazhsherasha|gokizhawazhsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:zhawazhngasha|zhawazhngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gozhawazhnkngasha|gozhawazhnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokizhawazhngasha|gokizhawazhngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhawazhyasha|zhawazhyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gozhawazhnkyasha|gozhawazhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokizhawazhyasha|gokizhawazhyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:zhawazhyamasha|zhawazhyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gozhawazhnkyamasha|gozhawazhnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokizhawazhyamasha|gokizhawazhyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:zhawazhn眉sh毛sha|zhawazhn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozhawazhnkn眉sh毛sha|gozhawazhnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizhawazhn眉sh毛sha|gokizhawazhn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhawazhn眉rosha|zhawazhn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhawazhnkn眉rosha|gozhawazhnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizhawazhn眉rosha|gokizhawazhn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhawazhn眉musha|zhawazhn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhawazhnkn眉musha|gozhawazhnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhawazhn眉musha|gokizhawazhn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:zhawazhsh毛n眉sha|zhawazhsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozhawazhnksh毛n眉sha|gozhawazhnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizhawazhsh毛n眉sha|gokizhawazhsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhawazhsh毛rosha|zhawazhsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhawazhnksh毛rosha|gozhawazhnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizhawazhsh毛rosha|gokizhawazhsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhawazhsh毛musha|zhawazhsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhawazhnksh毛musha|gozhawazhnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhawazhsh毛musha|gokizhawazhsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:zhawazhron眉sha|zhawazhron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozhawazhnkron眉sha|gozhawazhnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizhawazhron眉sha|gokizhawazhron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:zhawazhrosh毛sha|zhawazhrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozhawazhnkrosh毛sha|gozhawazhnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizhawazhrosh毛sha|gokizhawazhrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhawazhromusha|zhawazhromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhawazhnkromusha|gozhawazhnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhawazhromusha|gokizhawazhromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:zhawazhmun眉sha|zhawazhmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozhawazhnkmun眉sha|gozhawazhnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizhawazhmun眉sha|gokizhawazhmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:zhawazhmush毛sha|zhawazhmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozhawazhnkmush毛sha|gozhawazhnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizhawazhmush毛sha|gokizhawazhmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhawazhmurosha|zhawazhmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhawazhnkmurosha|gozhawazhnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizhawazhmurosha|gokizhawazhmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:zhawazh|zhawazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:zh忙w忙zh|zh忙w忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hozhawazh|hozhawazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hozh忙w忙zh|hozh忙w忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohozhawazh|hohozhawazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohozh忙w忙zh|hohozh忙w忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉zhawazh|n眉zhawazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉zh忙w忙zh|n眉zh忙w忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉zhawazh|n眉n眉zhawazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉zh忙w忙zh|n眉n眉zh忙w忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂zhawazh|n茂zhawazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂zh忙w忙zh|n茂zh忙w忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂zhawazh|n茂n茂zhawazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂zh忙w忙zh|n茂n茂zh忙w忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luzhawazh|luzhawazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luzh忙w忙zh|luzh忙w忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluzhawazh|luluzhawazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluzh忙w忙zh|luluzh忙w忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lizhawazh|lizhawazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lizh忙w忙zh|lizh忙w忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilizhawazh|lilizhawazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilizh忙w忙zh|lilizh忙w忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kozhawazh|kozhawazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kozh忙w忙zh|kozh忙w忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokozhawazh|kokozhawazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokozh忙w忙zh|kokozh忙w忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kezhawazh|kezhawazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kezh忙w忙zh|kezh忙w忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekezhawazh|kekezhawazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekezh忙w忙zh|kekezh忙w忙zh]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
